query: Find any files we have related to our most valuable open deal and summarise them.
reasoning: The task requires a search for files associated with the most valuable open deal, which likely involves identifying that deal through Salesforce and then retrieving related files through Graph. A synthesis of the findings will summarize the relevant documents.
